title: Košice, Košice Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Košice, Košice Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Košice is a city in Košice Region with a population of 238,593. Slovakia’s second city and the heart of the east, a 2013 European Capital of Culture with a stunning Gothic cathedral, a vibrant arts scene, and a growing IT sector.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
